blocking_notes.adaptive_attack: summary-level rows only; no per-trace scored matrix
blocking_notes.cross_base_task: AUROC matrix only; no TPR@1%FPR/FPR0/CI columns in result lock
blocking_notes.baseline_head_to_head: no per-seed CI or TPR@1%FPR in result lock
blocking_notes.student_level_ci: usable for manuscript; only three strata in result lock
blocking_notes.mtcr_task_profiles: task surplus summary only; not raw per-view scored matrix
blocking_notes.review_archive: descriptive patterns and truncated hashes; no local file verification
